ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publisher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publisher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadband_speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadband speed */,
  "speed_range" TEXT /* Range of broadband speed (e.g., > 30Mb/s) */,
  "speed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the broadband speed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the speed record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the speed record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_points" (
  "access_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access point */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher providing the access point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the access point is available */,
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadband speed offered by the access point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the access point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the access point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the access point */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date the access point was activated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the access point (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access point record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access point record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_points_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_points_speed_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_id") REFERENCES broadband_speeds ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_points_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of coordinates */,
  "access_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the access point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the access point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the access point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coordinates record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coordinates record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_coordinates_access_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_point_id") REFERENCES access_points ("access_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "access_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the access point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, connect) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the access point */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the access point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_point_id") REFERENCES access_points ("access_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
